title: Second accused charged in case against K9 unit sergeant
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A second accused in the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A second accused in the case against K9 Langeberg Unit Sergeant, Jacobus 'JM' Spangenberg, appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court today, 10 October.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A second accused in the case against K9 Langeberg Unit Sergeant, Jacobus 'JM' Spangenberg, appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court today, 10 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Xolisa Msizi was arrested yesterday, 9 October following Spangenberg's first court appearance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Msizi and Spangenberg are facing charges of corruption, fraud, possession of explosives and defeating the ends of justice.","html":"Msizi and Spangenberg are facing charges of corruption, fraud, possession of explosives and defeating the ends of justice."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Msizi's bail application was postponed to Monday 13 October. He remains in police custody until then.","html":"Msizi's bail application was postponed to Monday 13 October. He remains in police custody until then."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Yesterday, Spangenberg was granted bail of R5 000 under strict conditions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He will reappear in court on Wednesday 3 December.","html":"He will reappear in court on Wednesday 3 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Mossel Bay K9 sergeant up for possession of explosives, fraud","Mossel Bay K9 sergeant arrested"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Second accused charged in case against K9 unit sergeant
